computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.details: Computes the new balance of a token after an operation, given the invariant growth ratio and all other balances.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Current live balances (adjusted for decimals, rates, etc.)
params.invariantRatio: The ratio of the new invariant (after an operation) to the old
params.tokenInIndex: The index of the token we're computing the balance for, in token registration order

returns.newBalance: The new balance of the selected token, after the operation

returns._0: The maximum invariant ratio for a pool during unbalanced add liquidity
The maximum swap fee percentage for a pool
The minimum invariant ratio for a pool during unbalanced remove liquidity
The minimum swap fee percentage for a pool
